## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Security fix

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual test in dev (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Docker build / run (if Dockerfile or runtime config changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped and focused — no drive-by refactors
- [ ] New behavior has tests (or the PR explains why not)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, config tables, etc.)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new secrets committed; env changes reflected in `.env.example`
- [ ] Breaking changes called out explicitly above

## Security considerations

<!-- Any new endpoints, env vars, file writes, or shell executions? -->
